failure.symptom: Requires Lemmy backend API. Bug confirmed via source: Multiple issues — 1) VirtualFeed uses divide-y-2 (thick dividers) instead of divide-y; 2) Shell.svelte navbar uses 'max-md:-bottom-24' without ! important modifier; 3) NavButton lacks transition property. Fix: divide-y, adds ! modifier, adds transition timing.
failure.recommendation: 跳过，需 Lemmy 后端。Bug：Feed 分隔线过粗 + navbar 重要性修饰符 + 缺过渡动画
